en: have you ever told a lie? Everyone has. But have you ever thought what it could do to
you? What if not lying would give you a better job? What if that job pays more? Would you
still do it? You've probably thought, eh, this one lie won't hurt. But then you keep
ko: 아마 이 한 번의 거짓말은 괜찮겠지 하고 생각했을 거야.

en: doing it over and over and over until it becomes a habit. Once it becomes a habit, people start
avoiding you. I know from experience. It will happen. My sister drew a red dot on her face
claiming it was a bug bite. I don't trust her as much anymore. And she's my own sister.
ko: 벌레 물린 거라고 했어. 이제 그녀를 예전만큼 믿지 못해.

en: This is only one of the things lying can do to you. Stress, unhappiness, and damaged mental
health are all things that can happen when you lie. Why do these things happen? Let me tell
ko: 거짓말을 할 때 일어날 수 있는 것들이야.
